name: DC Hub MCP Server
description: Live data center, grid, and energy intelligence. 20,000+ facilities globally, 280+ markets with composite DCPI scores, real-time grid data across 10 North-American grid operators (7 US ISOs plus TVA, BPA and Ontario's IESO) and 43 US utility balancing authorities, EIA retail electricity rates per state, and $324B+ M&A history — all queryable from Claude Desktop with an instant programmatic-auth free tier.

use_cases.title: Site selection
use_cases.prompt: Find the best US market for a 200 MW data center build with ≤24-month time-to-power.

use_cases.title: Market comparison
use_cases.prompt: Compare Atlanta, Northern Virginia, and Cheyenne by excess power, retail rates, water risk, and fiber availability.

use_cases.title: M&A research
use_cases.prompt: List all data center acquisitions over $1B in the last 12 months, grouped by buyer.

use_cases.title: Real-time grid intelligence
use_cases.prompt: What's PJM's current interconnection queue, reserve margin, and average DCPI excess?
